diagnostics.name: server-imports-client
diagnostics.message: src/server/main.ts is classified as server. It imports src/client/ui.ts, which is classified as client.
diagnostics.details:
importer: src/server/main.ts
importer kind: server
imported: src/client/ui.ts
imported kind: client
diagnostics.suggestion: Move shared logic into shared/, or pass data from the client into a server entrypoint later.
